questionHtml: Use your answer to (a)(ii) to describe the paradigm shift that Einstein’s theory of special relativity produced.
markschemeHtml:
c is the same in all frames

OR

c is maximum velocity possible ✔

velocity addition frame dependent ✔

length/time/mass/fields relative measurements ✔

Newtonian/Galilean mechanics valid only at low speed ✔

meta.title: Use your answer to (a)(ii) to describe the paradigm shift that Einstein’s theory of special relativity produced.
